revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十四]][[zh:六月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十四]][[zh:六月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十四]][[zh:六月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十四]][[zh:六月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 14|qq=June 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 12|en|July 12|qid=Q2688|lt=July 12|1=July 12}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Prince Karu|en|Prince Karu|qid=Q27500727|lt=Prince Karu|1=Prince Karu}} , younger brother of {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Empress Kōgyoku|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} , ascended the throne as the 36th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|en|Emperor Kōtoku|qid=Q317980|lt=Emperor Kōtoku|1=Emperor Kōtoku}} . {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q314802}} became crown prince. * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|qid=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}} , {{ill|1541|en|1541|qid=Q6516|lt=1541|1=1541}} ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Takeda Harunobu) exiled his father, {{ill|Takeda Nobutora|en|Takeda Nobutora|qid=Q1192628|lt=Takeda Nobutora|1=Takeda Nobutora}} , from {{ill|Kai Province|en|Kai Province|qid=Q858076|lt=Kai Province|1=Kai Province}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 15|en|July 15|qid=Q2686|lt=July 15|1=July 15}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Gorō|ja|中村五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakamura Gorō|1=Nakamura Gorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11365265}} , {{ill|Ibaraki Tsukasa|ja|茨木司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki Tsukasa|1=Ibaraki Tsukasa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617852}} , {{ill|Sano Shimezunosuke|ja|佐野七五三之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sano Shimezunosuke|1=Sano Shimenosuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11384936}} , and {{ill|Tomikawa Jūrō|ja|富川十郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomikawa Jūrō|1=Tomikawa Jūrō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11456951}} committed seppuku at the Kyoto Shugoshoku residence.
== Births == * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22|1=July 22}} , {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōmei|en|Emperor Kōmei|qid=Q299179|lt=Emperor Kōmei|1=Emperor Kōmei}} , 121st emperor (d. {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} ) * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – {{ill|Umi-yama Tarō (First Generation)|ja|海山太郎 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umi-yama Tarō (First Generation)|1=Kaizan Tarō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11558870}} (d. {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}} )
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|qid=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}} , {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156545}} , samurai warlord (b. {{ill|1497|en|1497|qid=Q6702|lt=1497|1=1497}} ) * Year 5 of {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}} ) – {{ill|Ikuta Kengyō|ja|生田検校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikuta Kengyō|1=Ikuta Kengyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q92924038}} , koto musician and founder of the {{ill|Ikuta-ryū|ja|生田流|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikuta-ryū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 箏|1=Koto (instrument)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q289037}} school (b. {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} ) * Year 4 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}} , {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} ) – {{ill|Tsugaru Yasuchika|en|Tsugaru Yasuchika|qid=Q7849985|lt=Tsugaru Yasuchika|1=Tsugaru Yasuchika}} , 9th lord of the {{ill|Hirosaki Domain|en|Hirosaki Domain|qid=Q903555|lt=Hirosaki Domain|1=Hirosaki Domain}} (b. {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765|1=1765}} )
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Mud Bath (Tide Bath)|ja|住吉の泥湯（潮湯）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Mud Bath (Tide Bath)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – On Lunisolar June 14, bathing in the seawater of Nagasa-no-ura (now in {{ill|Sumiyoshi-ku, Osaka|ja|大阪市 住吉区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi-ku, Osaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ) in front of {{ill|Sumiyoshi-taisha|en|Sumiyoshi-taisha|qid=Q705949|lt=Sumiyoshi Taisha|1=Sumiyoshi-taisha}} was believed to bring protection from illness during the Edo period.<ref>[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/959908/52 大日本名所図会. 第１輯第５編摂津名所図会 p64-65] National Diet Library Digital Collections, {{doi|10.11501/959908|qq=}} </ref><ref>{{Cite journal|language=ja|author=Yoichi Hase, Kazumitsu Kuroda, Takefumi Hayashi, Takashi Iura, Tomoko Hashidera, Kan Yabuta, Emke Franziska, Ikuko Morimoto, Naoki Tani, Shugo Hirao |title=Study on Newly Discovered "Naniwa Famous Places Folding Screen" |date=March 2016 |journal=Heisei 27th Year Kansai University 130th Anniversary Commemorative Research Report (Naniwa Osaka Research) |publisher=Kansai University Naniwa Osaka Research Center |url=https://hdl.handle.net/10112/10067|qq=}} </ref> The belief persisted into the Meiji period, with many people bathing in the bay near the shrine’s mikoshi procession days to cure swelling.<ref>[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1920445/245 Officially Permitted Mud Bathing of Mixed Genders at Sumiyoshi Nagasa Bay – A Rare Sight] ‘Newspaper Compilation of Meiji History, Vol. 14’ Rinsen Publishing, 1936-1940, p445, {{doi|10.11501/1920445|qq=}} </ref>
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|13|6|15|5|14|7|6|0614|qq=}}
